mixStrategy: Full-spectrum electronic energize mix: Synth Bass (GM 38) anchors the low end (C1-C3) locked tightly to kick drum hits on beats 1&3 with driving eighth-note patterns. Warm Pad (GM 89) fills the harmonic mid-range (C3-C5) with sustained power chords changing every 2 bars, providing a wall of harmonic energy without cluttering the lead space. Sawtooth Lead (GM 81) cuts through the upper-mid to high range (C4-C6) with short punchy melodic phrases that ride above the pad. Drums provide relentless forward momentum with kick on 1&3, snare on 2&4, and driving hi-hat eighth notes throughout. Energy arc builds from 0.5 → 0.7 → 0.8 → 0.9 → 1.0 → 0.7 across the 45-second duration. All tracks follow the Am chord progression together: Am → Dm → F → G → Am → F → G → Am.

tracks.name: Sawtooth Lead
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 60-84 (C4-C6). Short punchy sawtooth phrases that cut through the mix. Emphasizes chord tones on strong beats with passing tones for momentum. Velocity builds with energy arc from 65 to 100.

tracks.name: Synth Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in MIDI 24-48 (C1-C3). Locked to kick drum on beats 1&3, with driving eighth-note patterns between kicks. Always plays chord roots. Velocity 80-100 building with energy arc.

tracks.name: Warm Pad
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in MIDI 48-72 (C3-C5). Sustained pad voicings providing harmonic foundation. Changes every 2-4 seconds aligned with chord progression. Wall of sound supporting the lead.

tracks.name: Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Full percussion spectrum using GM percussion map. Kick (36) on beats 1&3 for low-end punch, snare (38) on beats 2&4 for backbeat, hi-hat (42) driving eighth notes for relentless forward momentum.
